title: Bubble Sort
subtitle: Kabarcik siralama algoritmasi.
code:
<?php

function bubbleSort(array $arr): array {
    $n = count($arr);
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
        for ($j = 0; $j < $n - $i - 1; $j++) {
            if ($arr[$j] > $arr[$j + 1]) {
                $temp = $arr[$j];
                $arr[$j] = $arr[$j + 1];
                $arr[$j + 1] = $temp;
            }
        }
    }
    return $arr;
}

$numbers = [64, 34, 25, 12, 22, 11, 90];
echo "Siralanmamis dizi: " . implode(", ", $numbers) . "\n";

$sortedNumbers = bubbleSort($numbers);
echo "Siralanmis dizi: " . implode(", ", $sortedNumbers) . "\n";

// Adim adim siralama
echo "\nAdim adim siralama:\n";
$arr2 = [5, 2, 9, 1, 5];
$n = count($arr2);
for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
    for ($j = 0; $j < $n - $i - 1; $j++) {
        if ($arr2[$j] > $arr2[$j + 1]) {
            $temp = $arr2[$j];
            $arr2[$j] = $arr2[$j + 1];
            $arr2[$j + 1] = $temp;
        }
    }
    echo "Adim " . ($i + 1) . ": " . implode(", ", $arr2) . "\n";
}

// PHP'nin kendi sort fonksiyonu
echo "\nPHP'nin sort() fonksiyonu:\n";
$data = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9, 2, 6];
echo "Orijinal: " . implode(", ", $data) . "\n";
sort($data);
echo "Siralanmis: " . implode(", ", $data) . "\n";

?>
